tags.name: Aloh Cheekoh
tags.note: The waterfall is dedicated to dead souls (Mrega) of Idu Mishmis. No living Idu Mishmis are allowed to drink water from Aloh-Cheekoh. Drinking water is supposed to bring ill omen to the family.

tags.name: 桑曲
tags.note: The Tibetans call this river Zang Chu; Zayul Chu begins after the confluence with Rongto Chu
